storage_account_name = "pinsstodwdevuks9h80mb"

extract_base_path = f"abfss://horizon-migration-poc@{storage_account_name}.dfs.core.windows.net"
output_base_path = f"abfss://horizon-migration-poc@{storage_account_name}.dfs.core.windows.net"

print("Extract source path:", extract_base_path)
print("Output path:", output_base_path)

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

DOCS_DIR = f"{extract_base_path}/S62A"

print("Reading from:", DOCS_DIR)

docs_raw = (
    spark.read
        .format("csv")
        .option("header", "true")
        .option("multiLine", "true")
        .option("escape", "\"")
        .option("quote", "\"")
        .option("recursiveFileLookup", "true")
        .load(DOCS_DIR)
        .withColumn("_source_file", F.input_file_name())
)

print("Columns:", docs_raw.columns)
print("Row count:", docs_raw.count())

display(docs_raw.orderBy(F.col("_source_file")).limit(50))

docs_clean = (
    docs_raw
    .withColumn(
        "dateCreated",
        F.when(
            F.col("dateCreated").isNull() |
            F.lower(F.trim(F.col("dateCreated"))).isin("undefined", "null", ""),
            F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")
        ).otherwise(
            F.to_timestamp(F.trim(F.col("dateCreated")), "dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm:ss")
        )
    )
    .withColumn(
        "lastModified",
        F.when(
            F.col("lastModified").isNull() |
            F.lower(F.trim(F.col("lastModified"))).isin("undefined", "null", ""),
            F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")
        ).otherwise(
            F.to_timestamp(F.trim(F.col("lastModified")), "dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm:ss")
        )
    )
    .withColumn("uploadedDate", F.col("dateCreated"))
)

docs_clean.printSchema()

docs_x = (
    docs_clean
    .withColumn(
        "caseRefFromPath",
        F.regexp_extract(F.col("path"), r"(?i)(S62A_\d{4}_\d+)", 1)
    )
    .withColumn(
        "caseRefFromPath",
        F.when(F.length(F.col("caseRefFromPath")) == 0, None).otherwise(F.col("caseRefFromPath"))
    )

    .withColumn(
        "relPath",
        F.regexp_extract(F.col("path"), r"(?i)S62A_\d{4}_\d+[^/]*/(.*)$", 1)
    )
    .withColumn(
        "relPath",
        F.when(F.length(F.col("relPath")) == 0, None).otherwise(F.col("relPath"))
    )
)

display(
    docs_x.select("documentId", "path", "caseRefFromPath", "relPath").limit(50)

docs_with_guid = docs_x.withColumn("caseId", F.col("caseRefFromPath"))

print("Docs rows:", docs_with_guid.count())
print("Missing caseId:", docs_with_guid.filter(F.col("caseId").isNull()).count())

docs_with_segments = (
    docs_with_guid
    .withColumn("pathSegments", F.when(F.col("relPath").isNotNull(), F.split(F.col("relPath"), "/")))
    .withColumn(
        "ancestorPaths",
        F.when(F.col("relPath").isNull(), F.array())
         .otherwise(
             F.transform(
                 F.sequence(F.lit(1), F.size(F.col("pathSegments"))),
                 lambda i: F.array_join(F.slice(F.col("pathSegments"), F.lit(1), i), "/")
             )
         )
    )
)

display(docs_with_segments.select("documentId", "relPath", "ancestorPaths").limit(20))

exploded_folders = (
    docs_with_segments
    .select("caseId", F.explode("ancestorPaths").alias("folderPath"))
    .dropDuplicates(["caseId", "folderPath"])
)

folders_shaped = (
    exploded_folders
    .withColumn("depth", F.size(F.split(F.col("folderPath"), "/")))
    .withColumn("displayName", F.element_at(F.split(F.col("folderPath"), "/"), -1))
    .withColumn(
        "parentPath",
        F.when(F.col("depth") == 1, F.lit(None).cast("string"))
         .otherwise(F.expr("array_join(slice(split(folderPath, '/'), 1, depth - 1), '/')"))
    )
    .withColumn("id", F.expr("uuid()"))
)


from pyspark.sql.window import Window
sibling_window = Window.partitionBy("caseId", "parentPath").orderBy("displayName")

folders_shaped = folders_shaped.withColumn(
    "displayOrder", F.row_number().over(sibling_window) * 100
)

folders_final = (
    folders_shaped.alias("f")
    .join(
        folders_shaped.alias("p"),
        (F.col("f.caseId") == F.col("p.caseId")) & (F.col("f.parentPath") == F.col("p.folderPath")),
        "left"
    )
    .select(
        F.col("f.id").alias("id"),
        F.col("f.displayName").alias("displayName"),
        F.col("f.displayOrder").alias("displayOrder"),
        F.col("p.id").alias("parentFolderId"),
        F.col("f.caseId").alias("caseId"),
        F.lit(True).alias("isCustom"),  
        F.lit(None).cast("timestamp").alias("deletedAt"),
        F.col("f.folderPath").alias("legacyFolderPath")  
    )
)

print("Folder rows to load:", folders_final.count())
display(folders_final.orderBy("caseId", "legacyFolderPath"))

docs_with_folder = (
    docs_with_segments
    .join(
        folders_final.select(
            F.col("caseId").alias("f_caseId"),
            F.col("legacyFolderPath").alias("f_path"),
            F.col("id").alias("folderId")
        ),
        (docs_with_segments["caseId"] == F.col("f_caseId")) &
        (docs_with_segments["relPath"] == F.col("f_path")),
        "left"
    )
    .drop("f_caseId", "f_path")
)

print("Docs with relPath but no folderId (should be 0):",
      docs_with_folder.filter(F.col("relPath").isNotNull() & F.col("folderId").isNull()).count())
print("Docs sitting at case root (no subfolder, folderId null by design):",
      docs_with_folder.filter(F.col("relPath").isNull()).count())

display(docs_with_folder.select("documentId", "relPath", "folderId", "caseId").limit(50))

DOCUMENT_OUTPUT_PATH = f"{output_base_path}/S62A/S62A-TRANSFORM/Document"
FOLDER_OUTPUT_PATH = f"{output_base_path}/S62A/S62A-TRANSFORM/Folder"

(
    docs_with_mime
    .drop("pathSegments", "ancestorPaths")   
    .coalesce(1)
    .write
    .mode("overwrite")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("sep", "|")
    .option("quote", "\"")
    .option("escape", "\\")
    .csv(DOCUMENT_OUTPUT_PATH)
)

(
    folders_final
    .coalesce(1)
    .write
    .mode("overwrite")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("sep", "|")
    .option("quote", "\"")
    .option("escape", "\\")
    .csv(FOLDER_OUTPUT_PATH)
)

print("Wrote Document output to:", DOCUMENT_OUTPUT_PATH)
print("Wrote Folder output to:", FOLDER_OUTPUT_PATH)
